title: Improve form UX, add themed background, highlight high-spend history rows, celebration animation on expensive entry

requirements.text: Redesign the Add Expense form in AddExpense.tsx so that the category dropdown and all dependent fields are clearly separated and stacked vertically with no visual overlap. The category selector must render as a full-width visually distinct card/selector (not a small inline dropdown that overlaps other fields). The sub-category selector must appear below the category selector in its own clearly labelled row only when a category with sub-categories is selected. Amount, Notes, and all other fields must each occupy their own clearly separated full-width row. No field labels or input rows should visually overlap with the dropdown options list at any time.

quotes: fields like this.. means mixed below columns hard to identify expense type. So make them dynamic and clear to select

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the category selector does not visually overlap Amount, Notes, or Save Expense button areas
Each form field (Date, Expense Type, Sub-category, Amount, Notes) is in its own distinct full-width stacked row
Sub-category row is hidden when no sub-category category is selected and appears smoothly below the category row when applicable
All category options are individually tappable with adequate tap target size (min 44px height)
Form remains fully functional on 320px–430px screen widths

requirements.text: Add a decorative background to the Add Expense and History pages (and optionally the full app shell) featuring soft, semi-transparent themed symbols — Indian Rupee (₹), shopping bag, medical cross/pill, food bowl, petrol pump — arranged as a subtle repeating pattern. The background must not reduce text readability or contrast. Use warm amber/saffron tones consistent with the existing color palette. Render the background as a generated SVG or PNG asset placed in frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: create butiful background with symbol like rupay, shopping, medical symbols

acceptanceCriteria: Background pattern is visible on the Add Expense and History pages
Symbols include at least: ₹ (Rupee), shopping bag, medical cross, food icon
Background does not reduce readability of any form field, label, or list item
Background uses warm amber/saffron palette consistent with existing theme
Background asset is served from frontend/public/assets/generated

requirements.text: In the History page (History.tsx), visually highlight expense rows where the amount is high. Define 'high amount' as any single expense entry that is ≥ ₹500. Highlighted rows should display a visually distinct treatment — e.g., a bold amber/red-tinted background, a flame or alert icon, or a prominent border — that makes them stand out in the list. The highlight must show alongside the existing category badge and sub-category label so the user can immediately identify the category and sub-category of high-spend entries.

quotes: highlight history page where am sending high amount with category and sub category

acceptanceCriteria: Expense rows with amount ≥ ₹500 render with a visually distinct highlight (color tint, icon, or border)
The category badge and sub-category label remain clearly visible on highlighted rows
Rows below ₹500 render with the normal/default style
Highlight is visible in both date-filtered and unfiltered history views
Highlight is accessible (contrast ratio maintained for text)

requirements.text: After the user successfully submits an expense entry in AddExpense.tsx, if the amount is ≥ ₹500, display a fun celebration overlay or inline animation (e.g., falling coins, a cartoon character reacting, or confetti) and/or play a short playful sound effect. The animation should auto-dismiss after 2–3 seconds without requiring user interaction. For entries below ₹500, the existing success banner is sufficient — no celebration needed.

quotes: Create some funny or cute image or sounds when ever I submit expensive

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting an expense ≥ ₹500 triggers a visible celebration animation (confetti, coins, or cute character)
Animation auto-dismisses after 2–3 seconds
A short playful sound effect plays on expensive submission (with graceful fallback if audio is blocked)
Submitting an expense < ₹500 shows only the normal success banner (no animation)
The celebration does not block the user from immediately adding another expense after it dismisses

requirements.text: Ensure all existing backend expense data is fully preserved across this upgrade. The backend Motoko actor in backend/main.mo must retain all stable variables and existing expense records. If any migration is needed, generate or update backend/migration.mo to migrate existing data without loss. The frontend must continue to read and display all previously saved expenses after the upgrade is deployed.

quotes: don't lose old new version also need that data

acceptanceCriteria: All expense entries saved before this upgrade remain accessible in the History tab after upgrade
No stable variable is removed or renamed in a way that would cause data loss on canister upgrade
migration.mo (if generated) correctly maps old state to new state without discarding records
getExpenses, getExpensesByDate, and getExpensesByDateRange return previously saved entries after upgrade

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All existing expense data must be preserved — no stable variable renames or drops without migration
Background decoration must not reduce text/input contrast or accessibility
Celebration animation must auto-dismiss and must not block form interaction
nonGoals: Changing the overall app color palette away from the existing warm amber/saffron theme
Adding new expense categories or sub-categories beyond what already exists
Redesigning the bottom navigation bar or tab structure
Adding any real-time or server-push features
Changing the Repay Report page layout

required: Soft repeating pattern of semi-transparent themed finance symbols — Indian Rupee ₹, shopping bag, medical cross, food bowl, petrol pump drop — on a warm cream/amber background, suitable as a decorative page background tile (expense-bg-pattern.dim_800x800.png)
Cute cartoon coin character with big eyes and a happy expression, arms raised in celebration, on a transparent background (celebration-coin.dim_400x400.png)
